Do NOT use keys like source/sourceBranch/target/mergeCommit.

payload.argsPreview: cd /home/cyan/dev/github.com/chenxin-yan/crust/.worktrees/cyan-20260503T032608/merge && git status && echo "---" && git log --oneline -5 && echo "---" && git branch --show-current

payload.text: I'm on `_merge-temp-cyan-20260503T032608` which is based on the orch branch. Let me check that and proceed with the merge.

payload.text: Good — HEAD is exactly at orch tip. Now I'll merge the source branch.

payload.argsPreview: cd /home/cyan/dev/github.com/chenxin-yan/crust/.worktrees/cyan-20260503T032608/merge && git merge --no-ff task/cyan-lane-1-20260503T032608 -m "merge: wave 1 lane 1 — TP-008" 2>&1

payload.text: Clean merge, no conflicts. Now let me capture the merge commit SHA and run verification.

payload.argsPreview: cd /home/cyan/dev/github.com/chenxin-yan/crust/.worktrees/cyan-20260503T032608/merge && MERGE_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && echo "MERGE_SHA=$MERGE_SHA" && echo "$MERGE_SHA" > /tmp/merge_sha_w1l1.txt

payload.text: All 21 tasks passed. Let me get a summary status across the verification:
